title: Grilled Salad with Pecorino
description: A simple and flavorful vegetarian salad recipe with a grilled twist, topped with crispy pecorino cheese.

ingredients.name: Mixed greens
ingredients.notes: any combination of lettuce, arugula, spinach

instructions: 2. Toss the mixed greens and peppery salad with olive oil and a pinch of salt.
3. Grill the salad for 2-3 minutes per side, until slightly charred.
4. Crumble the pecorino cheese and sprinkle over the grilled salad.
5. Serve immediately, garnished with additional pecorino cheese if desired.
